sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Adobe FY26 Q1 사상 최고 매출 및 영업현금흐름 신기록, AI-first ARR 3배 이상 성장

keyPoints.text: FY26 1분기 매출은 64억 달러로 전년 대비 12% 성장하며 사상 최고 1분기 실적을 달성했다. AI-first ARR이 전년 대비 3배 이상 성장했으며, 구독 매출도 13% 증가했다.
Q1 영업 현금흐름이 29억 6,000만 달러로 사상 최고치를 기록했다. 회사는 이를 기반으로 수익성 있는 성장 전략을 지속적으로 실행하고 있다고 밝혔다.

businessChanges.text: 총 구독 매출은 61억 7,000만 달러로 전년 대비 13% 성장했다. Business Professionals & Consumers 구독 매출은 17억 8,000만 달러, Creative & Marketing Professionals는 43억 9,000만 달러였다.
분기 말 RPO는 222억 2,000만 달러였으며, cRPO 비율은 67%로 유지됐다. 자사주 약 810만 주를 매입했다.
Q2 FY26 가이던스: 총 매출 64억 3,000만~64억 8,000만 달러를 제시했다.

financialHighlights.text: FY26 Q1 매출 64억 달러(YoY +12%), 사상 최고 1분기 실적.
GAAP EPS 4.60달러, non-GAAP EPS 6.06달러. Non-GAAP 순이익 24억 9,000만 달러.
사상 최고 Q1 영업 현금흐름 29억 6,000만 달러, RPO 222억 2,000만 달러.

watchItems.text: Semrush 인수 완료 여부(규제 승인 조건부)와 통합 후 ARR 기여 효과가 Q2에 본격 반영되는지를 확인해야 한다.
AI-first ARR 3배 성장이 Q2에도 지속되는지, 가이던스 달성 여부가 연간 목표 상향의 근거가 될지 주목된다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 adbeex991q126.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Investor Relations Contact Doug Clark Adobe ir@adobe.com Public Relations Contact Ashley Levine Adobe adobepr@adobe.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Adobe Delivers Record Q1 Results • AI-first ARR more than triples year over year • Total subscription revenue and RPO increases 13% year over year • Record Q1 operating cash flows of $2.96 billion SAN JOSE, Calif. – March 12, 2026 – Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE), the global technology leader that unleashes creativity and productivity for individuals and businesses through innovative platforms and tools, today reported financial results for its first quarter FY2026 ended Feb. 27, 2026. “Adobe delivered record Q1 results with AI-first ARR more than tripling year over year and subscription revenue growing 13 percent,” said Shantanu Narayen, chair and CEO, Adobe. “Our mission to empower everyone to create  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.96 billion = 29억 6,000만 달러; $2.96 = 2.96달러; 13 percent = 13%.

represents an even larger opportunity as content powers all experiences in the AI era.” “Adobe delivered 13 percent subscription revenue growth and record Q1 cash flow of $2.96 billion,” said Dan Durn, executive vice president and CFO, Adobe. “As we accelerate AI-powered capabilities across creativity, productivity and customer experience orchestration, Adobe is well positioned for continued profitable growth.” First Quarter FY2026 Financial Highlights • Adobe achieved record revenue of $6.40 billion in its first quarter of FY2026, which represents 12% year-over-year growth, or 11% in constant currency. Diluted earnings per share was $4.60 on a GAAP basis and $6.06 on a non-GAAP  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.96 billion = 29억 6,000만 달러; $6.40 billion = 64억 달러; $26.06 billion = 260억 6,000만 달러; $2.42 billion = 24억 2,000만 달러; $3.04 billion = 30억 4,000만 달러; $2.96 = 2.96달러; $6.40 = 6.40달러; $4.60 = 4.60달러; $26.06 = 26.06달러; $6.06 = 6.06달러; $2.42 = 2.42달러; $3.04 = 3.04달러; 13 percent = 13%.

net income was $1.89 billion and non-GAAP net income was $2.49 billion. • Record Q1 cash flows from operations were $2.96 billion. • Exiting the quarter, Remaining Performance Obligations (“RPO”) were $22.22 billion, and Current Remaining Performance Obligations (“cRPO”) were 67%. • Adobe repurchased approximately 8.1 million shares during the quarter. First Quarter FY2026 Customer Group Highlights • Total Customer Group subscription revenue was $6.17 billion, which represents 13% year-over-year growth, or 12% in constant currency. • Business Professionals & Consumers subscription revenue was $1.78 billion, which represents  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.89 billion = 18억 9,000만 달러; $2.49 billion = 24억 9,000만 달러; $2.96 billion = 29억 6,000만 달러; $22.22 billion = 222억 2,000만 달러; 8.1 million = 810만 달러; $6.17 billion = 61억 7,000만 달러; $1.78 billion = 17억 8,000만 달러; $4.39 billion = 43억 9,000만 달러; $2.49 = 2.49달러; $4.39 = 4.39달러; $2.96 = 2.96달러; $22.22 = 22.22달러; $6.17 = 6.17달러; $1.78 = 1.78달러.

current macroeconomic conditions and do not include contributions from our pending acquisition of Semrush Holdings, Inc., subject to regulatory approvals and other customary closing conditions. The following table summarizes Adobe’s second quarter FY2026 targets: Total revenue $6.43 billion to $6.48 billion Business Professionals & Consumers subscription revenue $1.80 billion to $1.82 billion Creative & Marketing Professionals subscription revenue $4.41 billion to $4.44 billion Earnings per share 1 GAAP: $4.35 to $4.40 Non-GAAP: $5.80 to $5.85 1 Targets assume non-GAAP operating margin of ~44.5%, GAAP tax rate of ~22.5%, non-GAAP  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.43 billion = 64억 3,000만 달러; $6.48 billion = 64억 8,000만 달러; $1.80 billion = 18억 달러; $1.82 billion = 18억 2,000만 달러; $4.41 billion = 44억 1,000만 달러; $4.44 billion = 44억 4,000만 달러; 402 million = 4억 200만 달러; $6.43 = 6.43달러; $1.80 = 1.80달러; $4.40 = 4.40달러; $4.41 = 4.41달러; $4.44 = 4.44달러; $4.35 = 4.35달러; $5.80 = 5.80달러; $5.85 = 5.85달러.
